title: Bhaktavatsala Perumal Temple
tagline: Bhaktavatsala Perumal Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: The Bhaktavatsala Perumal Temple is a temple dedicated to Hindu god Vishnu, located in Thirukannamangai, a village in Tiruvarur district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu.
overview.description: The Bhaktavatsala Perumal Temple is a temple dedicated to Hindu god Vishnu, located in Thirukannamangai, a village in Tiruvarur district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Constructed in Dravidian style of architecture, the temple is glorified in the Nalayira Divya Prabandham, the early medieval Tamil canon of the Alvar saints from the 6th–9th centuries CE. It is counted as one among the 108 Divya Desams dedicated to Vishnu. Vishnu is worshipped as Bhaktavatsala Perumal and his consort Lakshmi as Kannamangai Nayagi. topPlaces.name: Dharmapureesvarar Temple, Vadakandam
topPlaces.description: Dharmapureesvarar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located at Vadakandam in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Karavera Nathar Temple
topPlaces.description: Karavera Nathar Temple (கரவீரநாதர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Karaveram in the Tiruvarur district of Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Bhaktavatsala Perumal Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Bhaktavatsala Perumal Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Bhaktavatsala Perumal Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (96 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (98 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Bhaktavatsala Perumal Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Bhaktavatsala Perumal Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Bhaktavatsala Perumal Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Bhaktavatsala Perumal Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Bhaktavatsala Perumal Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Dharmapureesvarar Temple, Vadakandam, Karavera Nathar Temple, Agarathirunallur, Deepangudi, Arasavanangadu.
